d7b_reasoning: The strategy exhibits a coherent mean reversion narrative: entering when price is below upper Bollinger (though the description mentions lower band, inconsistent with the code), with negative z-score, low RSI, and subdued volatility. Theme alignment is strong, utilizing Bollinger bands, z-score, and SMA – all core mean reversion factors from the hint vocabulary. The structural variant risk is very high: the factor set {bb_upper_24_2, close, realized_vol_24h, return_24h, rsi_14, sma_24, zscore_48} appears as entry 17 in the prior list, making this an almost exact duplicate with only threshold and operator adjustments (RSI 35 vs other values, volatility threshold changes).
